analysis.consistency: High. The spell adheres to standard D&D 5e spell formatting.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, includes mechanical details, and outlines scaling effects effectively.

scaling.details: Damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th (e.g., 6th level slot deals 9d8).

mechanics.flavor_effect: Creatures killed become frozen statues until thawed.

analysis.potential_improvements: None noted. The data is complete and standard for this spell.
